name: Raghu
title: Software Engineer
professional_summary: Passionate Software Engineer with over 3 years of experience in designing, developing, and delivering robust software solutions.
Proficient in Java and Spring Boot framework, with a strong understanding of object-oriented programming and design patterns.
Experienced in full software development lifecycle, including requirements gathering, design, development, testing, and deployment.
Skilled in agile methodologies, having worked in Scrum and Kanban environments effectively.
Strong problem-solving abilities, with a track record of identifying and implementing innovative solutions to complex issues.
Collaborative team player, comfortable working with cross-functional teams and stakeholders to deliver projects on time and within scope.
Familiar with version control systems such as Git for collaborative development and continuous integration.
Committed to continuous learning and professional development, regularly updating skills and staying abreast of new technologies.
Strong verbal and written communication skills, capable of explaining technical concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Dedicated to delivering high-quality, user-friendly software solutions that meet customer expectations and drive business success.

responsibilities: Developed modular, scalable, and secure web applications using Java and Spring Boot framework, adhering to design patterns and best practices.
Implemented data access layer using Spring Data and Hibernate for seamless database interaction and object-relational mapping.
Integrated RESTful APIs to facilitate communication between microservices and ensure seamless data exchange.
Utilized Git for version control, ensuring efficient collaboration among team members and facilitating continuous integration.
Conducted code reviews and provided constructive feedback to team members, ensuring code quality and adherence to coding standards.
Performed unit testing and integration testing to ensure the robustness and reliability of the developed software.
Collaborated with product owners and business analysts to understand requirements and translate them into technical specifications.
Designed and developed Java-based applications, ensuring modularity and reusability of code.
Implemented MVC architecture using Spring MVC framework, separating concerns and improving code maintainability.
Utilized SQL queries for data manipulation and retrieval, ensuring efficient database interactions.
Worked in an agile environment, actively participating in daily stand-ups, sprint planning, and retrospectives.
Conducted code refactoring to improve code readability and performance, adhering to clean code principles.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

certifications: Oracle Certified Associate: Java SE 8 Programmer
